cfg.show_regeneration_updates.name: Show Regeneration Updates
cfg.show_regeneration_updates.desc: Display updates when life and energy regenerate.
cfg.life_regeneration_rate.name: Life Regeneration Rate
cfg.life_regeneration_rate.desc: Set the rate at which life regenerates per tick. Set to 0 to disable.
cfg.energy_regeneration_rate.name: Energy Regeneration Rate
cfg.energy_regeneration_rate.desc: Set the rate at which energy regenerates per tick. Set to 0 to disable.
cfg.regeneration_delay.name: Regeneration Delay
cfg.regeneration_delay.desc: Set the delay in seconds between each regeneration tick.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
